issue_statement: Companion tools still infer engineering project readiness and open/import semantics from a mix of partial reads and action commands, which creates inconsistent frontend and CLI behavior.
expected_outcome: SCE exposes one canonical preview payload and one open/import result envelope so adapters can display engineering readiness without guessing.
impact_scope: app engineering projection, project preview/open flows, IDE and CLI engineering onboarding
reproduction_steps: Read existing engineering projection data for one app
Try to explain readiness and next action from separate attach/hydrate/activate states
Observe that adapters still need field synthesis and command-order inference
forbidden_workarounds: Do not solve readiness explanation by duplicating a frontend-owned registry
Do not mix scaffold/ownership fields into the preview/open contract
